description: TUI 终端界面 - 配对提示和连接状态

replacements.\"pairing required: run openclaw devices: "需要配对：运行 openclaw devices list"
replacements.\"Pairing required. Run `openclaw device: "需要设备配对。运行 `openclaw devices list`，批准你的请求 ID，然后重新连接。"
replacements.isLocalMode ? \"starting local runtime\": isLocalMode ? "正在启动本地运行时" : "正在连接"
replacements.isLocalMode ? \"local ready\" : reconnec: isLocalMode ? "本地就绪" : reconnected ? "网关已重连" : "网关已连接"
